creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks Brian,

For the record (and the PR completeness)... Perhaps some notice in the
pkg-message is in place?

It creates directories in /var/db/pkg to track the distfiles (i.e.
/var/db/pkg/<portname>/distfiles)
When I look in the port's directory in /var/db/pkg, the only file
there is indeed distfiles

Kind regards,

Spil.


On Mon, Sep 9, 2013 at 1:35 AM, Bryan Drewery <bdrewery@freebsd.org> wrote:
> This is due to the distfile tracking. It's not a critical issue. It is
> planned to be reworked in the future though.
>
> --
> Regards,
> Bryan Drewery
